subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen hath, throughout the nights and days, occupied itself with counsels and exhortations, and hath ordained that which befitteth their station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی در لیالی و ایام بمواعظ و نصایح مشغول و امر فرموده آنچه را که بر شان
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
